description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Within the next 7 days, start a booking for any 60-minute deep tissue massage on the earliest weekday evening that has an available start time at or after 5:00 PM, and proceed to the appointment details form.

target_names: 60-minute deep tissue massage on the earliest available weekday evening (Thursday at 5:00 PM)

tasks.instruction: Find a therapist who offers sports-focused massage with at least a 4.5-star rating and 20 or more reviews, then book a 90-minute sports massage with that therapist on a Saturday within the next 3 weeks starting between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM, and continue to the client information step.

target_names: 90-minute sports massage on Saturday at 10:00 AM with David Ross

tasks.instruction: From the available packages, add the least expensive active package for Swedish-style massages that includes at least 5 sessions and costs under $400 to your cart, then view the cart.

tasks.instruction: On the gift card page, configure an email-delivered gift card for a birthday occasion with a value under $150 for a friend and add it to your cart, then open the cart page.

tasks.instruction: Compare the service pages for a relaxation massage that includes essential oils and a massage that uses heated stones, choose whichever has the longer standard session length while costing $150 or less, then start a booking for that service on the upcoming Thursday between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM and proceed to the client information step.

target_names: Aromatherapy massage on Thursday at 11:00 AM with Sophia Martin

tasks.instruction: From the membership plans, filter to options that include at least one 90-minute massage each month and start enrollment for the plan with the lowest monthly price under $110.

tasks.instruction: Locate a first-time client promotion that gives at least 15% off a 60-minute massage and start a booking for a 60-minute Swedish-style massage on the upcoming Wednesday at or after 1:00 PM, then apply the best matching promo code in the discount field before continuing.

target_names: 60-minute Swedish massage on Wednesday at 1:30 PM with Ava Chen

tasks.instruction: Open the prenatal massage intake form and complete it for a pregnant client in the second trimester whose primary concern is shoulder pain and upper back tension, then submit the form.

tasks.instruction: Using the corporate or business contact options, submit a quote request for an on-site chair massage event for 15 employees on a specific weekday next month with a mid-afternoon time window and a budget under $1,000, including your contact details, then send the request.

expected_values.additional_notes: Budget of $900; please include travel fees in the quote and provide two therapists if possible.
